intended_use: BriefCase is a radiological computer aided triage and notification software indicated for use in the analysis of chest and abdominal CT images. The device is intended to assist hospital networks and a
intended_use_full: BriefCase is a radiological computer aided triage and notification software indicated for use in the analysis of chest and abdominal CT images. The device is intended to assist hospital networks and appropriately trained medical specialists within the standard-of-care bone health setting in workflow triage by flagging and communication of suspected positive cases of Vertebral Compression Fractures (VCFx) findings.
other_metrics: Positive Likelihood Ratio (PLR): 14.1606 (95% CI: 7.528-26.637); Negative Likelihood Ratio (NLR): 0.0524 (95% CI: 0.028-0.099); Mean time-to-notification: 117.2 seconds (95% CI: 98.64-135.85); Median time-to-notification: 71.5 seconds (IQR: 99.5)
